data.title: Clinical Outcomes of Prolensa (Bromfenac Ophthalmic Solution) 0.07% QD vs. Ilevro (Nepafenac Ophthalmic Suspension) 0.3% QD for Treatment of Ocular Inflammation Associated With Cataract Surgery
data.brief_summary: To investigate inflammation, visual acuity and macular thickness after treatment with Prolensa vs Ilevro after cataract surgery.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Are male or female at least 18 years of age who require cataract surgery and no other surgical procedures during the cataract surgery.
* Agree not to have any other ocular surgical procedures in the study or fellow (non study) eye within 15 days prior to the initiation of dosi
endpoints: Treatment of Inflammation Associated With Cataract Surgery
